summary: Large Rainbow Cruise stage decompilation pass centered on src/melee/gr/grrcruise.c. The PR replaced many placeholder target markers with C implementations, added Rainbow Cruise stage data and supporting structs, improved several partially matched functions to 100%, and exposed grAnime_801C7BA0 through granime.h so stage code could call it. decomp.dev reported +2004 matched bytes, 6 new matches, and 11 additional improvements in grrcruise, including complete matches for grRCruise_80201988, grRCruise_80201288, grRCruise_80201110, grRCruise_801FF7A4, grRCruise_801FF2C8, and grRCruise_80200074.
what_changed: Implemented many previously stubbed or partially matched Rainbow Cruise functions in grrcruise.c, including grRCruise_801FF924, grRCruise_801FFADC, grRCruise_80200154, grRCruise_80200578, grRCruise_8020071C, grRCruise_80200C04, grRCruise_80201110, grRCruise_80201288, grRCruise_80201410, grRCruise_80201588, and grRCruise_80201988.
Added grRc_803E4DA8 S16Vec3 stage table and struct StageData grRc_803E4ECC for RCRUISE, wiring callbacks, data file /GrRc.dat, dynamics hooks, and the stage joint table.
Moved grAnime_801C7BA0 from a local static declaration in granime.c to a public declaration in granime.h, enabling grrcruise.c to call it.
Updated grrcruise.h prototypes for grRCruise_80201288 and grRCruise_80201988 from UNK signatures to typed signatures: recursive DObj callback traversal and bool line-id predicate respectively.

Expanded grRCruise-related layouts in types.h: grRCruise_Entry.x10 became f32, grRCruise_GroundVars.x0C became s32, vanish entry/descriptor structs were introduced, grRCruise_GroundVars gained a vanish pointer and padding, and Map_GroundVars/ScrollVars gained fields used by Rainbow Cruise.
Changed Rainbow Cruise allocation sites to use named union fields such as gp->u.map.chikuwa and gp->u.map.vanish rather than older ambiguous members, with HSD_ASSERT checks.
Added and used stage/camera/collision/math dependencies including stage.h, types.h, lb_00B0.h, lbvector.h, math.h, baselib/jobj.h, baselib/random.h, and MSL/trigf.h.
smart_moves: Typed struct fields and unions enough to replace raw pointer/arithmetic access, for example using gp->u.scroll.x1C in grRCruise_80201918 instead of casting gp + 0xE0.
Promoted grAnime_801C7BA0 only as far as needed via granime.h rather than duplicating or keeping an invalid static declaration.
Used HSD_ASSERT line-number assertions and PAD_STACK annotations to preserve matching-sensitive code shape where allocation checks and stack layout mattered.
Kept the recursive JObj/DObj traversal in grRCruise_80201288 as an explicit helper with an inline HSD_JObjGetDObj wrapper, reflecting a matching tactic for register/control-flow-sensitive recursion.
Modeled Rainbow Cruise's stage-specific state machines directly: blinking/collision toggles, vanish platform states, rotating ship response to collision data, and camera-follow scroll offsets.

Encoded line/joint filtering in grRCruise_80201988 as a bool predicate over RCRUISE internal stage id and mpJointFromLine results, matching a stage-specific collision query without broadening behavior to other stages.
decomp_lessons: For stage files, matching often requires promoting unknown ground-variable storage into named union overlays such as map, scroll, rcruise, and rcruise2 instead of relying on byte offsets.
When a stage function needs an animation helper that was previously file-local, move the prototype to the header and remove the stale static declaration to avoid duplicate linkage assumptions.
Rainbow Cruise has multiple per-object state machines; structing entry arrays, vanish entries, and scroll variables makes switch-state code easier to match and review.

Matching recursive hierarchy traversal can require deliberately preserving redundant NULL checks and temporary variables; the merge commit explicitly noted that recursive traversal still needed register/control-flow matching during development.

Use exact engine helpers for visibility and collision state: HSD_JObjSetFlagsAll/ClearFlagsAll for JOBJ_HIDDEN, HSD_DObjSetFlags/ClearFlags via traversal, mpJointListAdd, mpLib_80057BC0, mpLib_80055E9C, and mpLib_80057424.
Stage matching may depend on using the project assert macro HSD_ASSERT with original line constants rather than generic __assert or hand-written NULL branches.
naming_conventions: Rainbow Cruise functions use the grRCruise_80xxxxxx address-based naming convention.
Stage data symbols in this file use the grRc_803E.... and grRc_804D.... data-symbol convention, distinct from function prefix grRCruise_.
New structs preserve project-style stage prefixes: grRCruise_Entry, grRCruise_SubEntry, grRCruise_VanishEntry, grRCruise_VanishDesc, grRCruise_GroundVars, and ScrollVars.
Unknown fields remain address/offset-style names such as x00, x04, xC4, pad_74 when semantic names are not yet proven.
Header prototypes retain address comments such as /* 201288 */ and replace UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS only when a signature is evidenced by the implementation.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added PAD_STACK(8), PAD_STACK(0x8), PAD_STACK(0x18), and PAD_STACK(16) in several functions to tune stack layout.
Used HSD_ASSERT with specific source line constants such as 0x19A, 0x2B0, 0x2B2, 0x2E0, 0x5AD, 0x5B3, and 0x5D6.
Used f32 constants and trig/math functions in forms likely chosen for codegen, including atan2f, cosf, sinf, sqrtf, 0.017453292f, 1.0471976f, 10.0f, 350.0f, and 0.008f.
Kept explicit temporary variables, repeated Ground_801C2BA4 lookups, and NULL-guard patterns in camera/vanish code rather than aggressively simplifying.
Implemented grRCruise_80201288 as recursive child/next JObj traversal over DObjs with a callback signature void (*)(HSD_DObj*, u32), matching HSD_DObjSetFlags and HSD_DObjClearFlags callers.
Used ARRAY_SIZE(grRc_803E4DA8) when wiring the RCRUISE StageData table.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
The decomp.dev bot reported +0.05% matched code and +2004 bytes, with 6 new matches and 11 improvements in main/melee/gr/grrcruise.

Merge commit messages indicate iterative fixes for imports, asserts, arithmetic, padding, a typo, and improved matching for grRCruise_801FF924, grRCruise_80201988, grRCruise_80201110, and grRCruise_801FFADC; these are commit-summary evidence rather than reviewer feedback.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that finish or rename grRCruise_801FFADC, grRCruise_80200C04, grRCruise_8020071C, grRCruise_80201588, or remaining partial Rainbow Cruise functions.
Search for uses of ScrollVars in other stage files to validate whether the generic name and offsets remained stable.
Search for later type refinements of grRCruise_GroundVars, grRCruise_Entry, grRCruise_VanishEntry, and grRCruise_VanishDesc.
Search for PRs touching grAnime_801C7BA0 to see whether the exported prototype gained a semantic name or broader usage.
